name: @agentbnb/skill-inspector
deprecated: Deprecated as of AgentBnB v10 (Agent Maturity Rental). Maturity Evidence — not skill graph introspection — is the v10 trust surface. See packages/skill-inspector/README.md.
description: [DEPRECATED v10] Read-only Skill Inspector for AgentBnB — parses SKILL.md files into a node graph with risk + provenance overlays. Superseded by Agent Maturity Rental (ADR-022). Kept on best-effort basis until removal milestone.
